info.title: Salon Booking API
info.description: API documentation for the Salon Booking backend.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin dashboard, statistics, reports, and user management APIs

post.summary: Verify signup OTP and activate account
Sign in with email, phone, or identifier
post.description: Returns an access token and sets an HTTP-only refreshToken cookie.
Admin-only endpoint. Creates or updates stylist profiles for users whose role is STAFF, matching by email or phone.

get.description: Staff-only endpoint. The backend creates or updates the stylist profile from the current STAFF user, matching by email or phone.

get.summary: List services assigned to current staff stylist

post.summary: Assign service to current staff stylist

put.summary: Replace all services for current staff stylist

delete.summary: Remove service from current staff stylist

put.summary: Replace all services assigned to stylist

post.description: If items are omitted, the backend creates the booking from the current user's cart.

get.summary: Get current user's booking by ID

post.description: Creates an unpaid billing record for a booking owned by the current user. If a billing already exists for the booking, the existing billing is returned.
Admin can create a user with role STAFF to let the account access staff stylist endpoints. When the saved role is STAFF, the backend syncs a stylist profile from the user's email or phone.

put.description: Admin can set role to STAFF to let an existing user access staff stylist endpoints. When the saved role is STAFF, the backend syncs a stylist profile from the user's email or phone.
